_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Ability TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.448), TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.442).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.697). Shared vocabulary: [identify, system]. NICE-only terms [capabilities, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.887, R=0.843). P exceeds R by 0.045 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (65.7%). The model interprets "Identify system and network capabilities" as logically implying aspects of "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.474 < STS 0.697 (gap -0.223). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [capabilities, network] and [ability, across, application] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [identify, system]. NICE-only: [capabilities, network]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].
